name: Windows Crash Resilience Dry Run
description: Report-only crash-proof agent resilience lane for driver signing/Secure Boot status, safe-boot recovery contract, response guardrail contract, offline/backpressure budget, and transactional update planning. Commands do not load/unload drivers, alter boot state, execute response actions, or apply updates.

evidence_scope: driver signing and Secure Boot status reported without changing driver state
safe-boot recovery markers declared as planned/not executed
offline queue and backpressure budget declared as report-only release blockers
response safety rails declared for protected OS and Tamandua processes
transactional OTA stages declared as planned/not executed
promotion_requires: driver signing state distinguishes unsigned, lab-signed, test-signed, attestation-signed, and WHQL/HLK-signed builds
stale boot/crash marker simulation enters degraded mode without repeatedly loading risky driver paths
offline queue exposes bytes, oldest event age, dropped count, upload rate, and priority drops
agent-side response guardrails deny protected OS, Tamandua, and control-plane-breaking actions locally
transactional update verifies staged signature/hash and rolls back to previous known-good after failed health window

claim_boundary: Dry-run crash resilience contract only. Passing this profile proves that safe report-only probes and release blockers are represented; it does not prove Secure Boot production driver loading, degraded boot recovery, offline replay, response containment safety, or transactional OTA rollback.

tests.name: Driver Signing Secure Boot Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$secureBoot = try { Confirm-SecureBootUEFI -ErrorAction Stop } catch { 'unknown_or_unsupported' }; $drivers = @(& sc.exe query type= driver state= all 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'tamandua|tamd' -CaseSensitive:$false | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }); [pscustomobject]@{ SecureBoot=$secureBoot; DriverSigningState='not_classified_without_release_manifest'; DriverLines=$drivers; RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

tests.name: Safe Boot Recovery Plan Not Executed
